ddls:
CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the supplier */,
  "date_registered" TEXT /* Date when the supplier was registered in the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "substances" (
  "substance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each substance */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the substance */,
  "ec_number" TEXT /* EC number of the substance */,
  "cas_number" TEXT /* CAS number of the substance */,
  "registration_status" TEXT /* Registration status of the substance */,
  "molecular_formula" TEXT /* Molecular formula of the substance */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the substance */,
  "physical_state" TEXT /* Physical state of the substance */,
  "hazard_class" TEXT /* Hazard class of the substance */,
  "safety_data_sheet" TEXT /* File path to the safety data sheet (SDS) of the substance */,
  "date_registered" TEXT /* Date when the substance was registered in the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("substance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration */,
  "substance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the substance being registered */,
  "registrant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the registrant */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of registration */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the substance registered */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the quantity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the registration */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the registration was approved */,
  "rejection_reason" TEXT /* Reason for rejection, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_substance_id FOREIGN KEY ("substance_id") REFERENCES substances ("substance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulatory_info" (
  "regulatory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regulatory entry */,
  "substance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the substance being regulated */,
  "regulation" TEXT /* Name of the regulation */,
  "regulatory_text" TEXT /* Text of the regulation */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the regulation became effective */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the regulation expires */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Compliance status of the substance with the regulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("regulatory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regulatory_info_substance_id FOREIGN KEY ("substance_id") REFERENCES substances ("substance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "substance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the substance being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the update */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the update was approved */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_updates_substance_id FOREIGN KEY ("substance_id") REFERENCES substances ("substance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dossiers" (
  "dossier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dossier */,
  "substance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the substance being documented */,
  "dossier_file" TEXT /* File path to the dossier */,
  "dossier_size" REAL /* Size of the dossier in MB */,
  "date_submitted" TEXT /* Date when the dossier was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the dossier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dossier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dossiers_substance_id FOREIGN KEY ("substance_id") REFERENCES substances ("substance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object or array of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_registrant" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "registrant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the registrant */,
  "date_associated" TEXT /* Date when the user was associated with the registrant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "registrant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_supplier" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "date_associated" TEXT /* Date when the user was associated with the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "supplier_id")
)
